name: Manuals-and-Documentation-V1.docx
content:
How do I request a manual or technical documentation for my machine?

Manuals and technical documentation for current and many legacy C.E. King machines can be requested from the support team. Some documentation is available for purchase through the king.parts online store.

Details

  • Email support@ceking.com with your machine model and serial number
  • Provide the serial number from the plate on the rear of the machine's base cabinet
  • Available documentation may include: user manuals, parts lists, electrical diagrams
  • Some manuals for legacy machines (pre-2000) may no longer be available
  • Kalish machine documentation: limited availability depending on model and age
  • TB4 manuals: available for most serial numbers
  • Technofill and Technocount manuals: available for current production models
  • Documentation for machines over 25 years old may have limited or no records

Link: https://www.king.parts
